_fixture_note: Real output from 2026-07-16, the day this skill was built. Cost Explorer had just been enabled on the account (first-visit auto-enable) and was still backfilling data -- AWS documents up to a 24h delay before GetCostAndUsage returns anything. This fixture captures the REAL degradation path: a DataUnavailableException per section, caught and reported in `errors`, with no crash and no fabricated data. The happy-path (real cost rows, a real anomaly) is pending a follow-up live run once data backfills -- tracked as an open verification item, not silently assumed.
region_note: Cost Explorer has no regional scope of its own -- API calls are pinned to us-east-1 regardless of where resources actually run.
scope_note: Costs reflect only what this IAM principal's Cost Explorer access can see -- under AWS Organizations consolidated billing, a linked-account principal may see a narrower scope than the full org.

errors.daily_cost_by_service: An error occurred (DataUnavailableException) when calling the GetCostAndUsage operation: Data is not available. Please try to adjust the time period. If just enabled Cost Explorer, data might not be ingested yet
errors.month_over_month: An error occurred (DataUnavailableException) when calling the GetCostAndUsage operation: Data is not available. Please try to adjust the time period. If just enabled Cost Explorer, data might not be ingested yet
